targetGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target group

targetGroupName.description: The name of the target group

protocol.description: The protocol to use for routing traffic to the targets

port.description: The port on which the targets are listening

vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC for the targets

healthCheckProtocol.description: The protocol to use for health checks

healthCheckPort.description: The port to use for health checks

healthCheckIntervalSeconds.description: The approximate interval between health checks

healthCheckTimeoutSeconds.description: The amount of time to wait for a health check response

healthyThresholdCount.description: The number of consecutive health checks required to consider a target healthy

unhealthyThresholdCount.description: The number of consecutive health check failures required to consider a target unhealthy

healthCheckPath.description: The destination for health checks on the targets

loadBalancerArns.description: The ARNs of the load balancers that route traffic to this target group
